task_definition.target_label: truth_top1 within (date, cluster_name) among eligible rows where eligible = (pnl_real > avg_sl_train); fallback to top1(date-universe) when eligible_count(date, cluster_name) < 2
task_definition.rank_target_train: rank_target_stage_a = pnl_real / avg_sl_train for eligible rows; 0 for ineligible rows
task_definition.temporal_horizon: same realized event horizon already materialized in pooled phase4 rows via pnl_real / label / event_date; one contest per date
task_definition.ranking_calculation: model predicts rank_score_stage_a OOS; highest rank_score_stage_a wins each local or fallback contest
task_definition.research_only_operational_proxy: Select TOP 1 by rank_score_stage_a within (date, cluster_name) among eligible rows; fallback to TOP 1 in the date-universe when local eligible support < 2.

support_and_fallback.support_rationale: Top1 within a group of size 1 is tautological; min support 2 forces actual within-cluster competition before delegating to the date-universe winner.

task_definition.evaluation_without_leakage: rank_target_stage_a = pnl_real / avg_sl_train for eligible = (pnl_real > avg_sl_train); proxy selection = top1(rank_score_stage_a) within (date, cluster_name) among eligible rows; fallback to top1(date-universe) when eligible_count(date, cluster_name) < 2

runner_execution.cross_sectional_manifest_note: When PROBLEM_TYPE=cross_sectional_ranking, the runner trains on a continuous realized rank target (pnl_real / avg_sl_train for eligible rows) and evaluates top1 selection within each CPCV partition. The local-vs-fallback contest scope is built only from realized pnl_real, avg_sl_train, date and cluster_name. No official phase4 score or activation field is used to define the target.

blocker_real: O baseline cross-sectional melhora historico/priorizacao sobre a familia abandonada, mas ainda nao abre latest activation/headroom suficiente.
